name: Sun Frontier Fudousan Co., Ltd.
summary: Sun Frontier Fudousan Co., Ltd. provides real estate revitalization and real estate services to building owners, asset holders, and wealthy individuals in Tokyo. It operates through Real Estate Revitalization Business, Real Estate Service Business, Operation Business, and Other segments. The company offers replanning, property management, commercial real estate brokerage, and office and store leasing services, as well as construction and renovation services for commercial properties, office buildings, and condominiums. It also provides building management, construction planning, delinquent rent guarantee, and asset consultancy services. In addition, the company engages in the hotel development and operation business. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
